────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ◐  optiqor
  Helm chart cost optimization · security as a bonus
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  Source      <REPO>/testdata/fixtures/basic-chart/values.yaml
  Workloads   15 workloads analyzed
  Cost        ✓ no cost waste detected
  Security    12 findings — bonus, surfaced while parsing

━━ Security findings  (bonus, 12) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  Spotted while parsing your chart. Cost is the headline; this is a bonus.

   HIGH   admin-tool      ●●●   allowPrivilegeEscalation explicitly enabled
   HIGH   admin-tool      ●●●   Container declared privileged
   HIGH   admin-tool      ●●●   Container runs as root
   HIGH   memhog          ●●●   Pod shares the host IPC namespace
   HIGH   memhog          ●●●   Memory limit not set
   HIGH   ptrace-hunter   ●●●   Dangerous Linux capability added
   HIGH   ptrace-hunter   ●●●   Pod shares the host PID namespace
   HIGH   ptrace-hunter   ●●●   Container runs as root
   HIGH   ptrace-hunter   ●●●   runAsUser explicitly set to 0
   HIGH   sniffer         ●●●   Pod uses host network
   HIGH   sniffer         ●●●   Pod mounts a hostPath volume
   HIGH   worker          ●●●   Memory limit not set

  Run `optiqor audit` to focus only on these findings.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Sandbox accuracy: ±40%. Install the Optiqor agent for exact numbers (optiqor.dev/get).
